summary: Admin Delete Endpoints (Iteration 93) - Backend 13/13 tests passed, Frontend all delete flows verified. DELETE endpoints for daily-reports, cuisine/messages, cuisine/events working correctly with proper 403/404 handling. GET /cuisine/messages/all admin-only endpoint working. UI components DailyReportsList and CuisineMessagesAdminList displaying correctly with inline trash buttons.
seed_data_creation: Test data created with TEST_ prefix for cleanup identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin delete endpoints fully implemented and tested. Backend: DELETE /api/daily-reports/{id} (admin-only, 403 for cuisinier), DELETE /api/cuisine/messages/{id} (admin-only, 403 for manager), DELETE /api/cuisine/events/{id} (admin-only, 403 for cuisinier), GET /api/cuisine/messages/all (admin-only, returns all messages with _id excluded). Frontend: RecoupementPanel has 'Rapports' tab showing DailyReportsList (data-testid='daily-reports-list') with inline trash buttons (data-testid='daily-report-delete-{id}') and CuisineMessagesAdminList (data-testid='cuisine-messages-admin-list') with trash buttons (data-testid='admin-msg-delete-{id}'). Messages display direction badges 'Cuisinier → Resp. Op.' or 'Resp. Op. → Cuisinier'. Delete confirmation uses simple window.confirm() without mandatory reason field.

cuisine_messages_all: test_get_all_messages_admin_success - PASSED (200 with messages list, _id excluded)
